lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਅਖੜੀਆ ਬਿਅੰਨਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਡਿਸੰਦੋ ਮਾ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak se akharreea bian jinee ddisando maa piree |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, these are not the eyes which can see my Beloved Husband Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin jan guramukh seviaa tin sabh sukh paaee |
lines.english: That humble being, who, as Gurmukh, serves the Lord, obtains all peace and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਸਭ ਤਿਖਾ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: on har naamaa dhan sanchiaa sabh tikhaa bujhaaee |
lines.english: He collects the wealth of the Lord's Name, and all his thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਤਰਿਆ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਿਉ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ohu aap tariaa kuttanb siau sabh jagat taraaee |
lines.english: He Himself is saved, along with his family, and all the world is saved as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਘਰਿ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਖਾ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: os sadaa sadaa ghar anand hai har sakhaa sahaaee |
lines.english: Forever and ever, the home of his heart is filled with bliss; the Lord is his companion, help and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਿ ਛਡੇ ਲਾਲਚ ਦੁਨੀ ਕੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: on chhadde laalach dunee ke antar liv laaee |
lines.english: He renounces worldly greed, and his inner being is lovingly attuned to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਆ ਓਹੀ ਅਲੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਜਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hoaa ohee al jag meh gur giaan japaaee |
lines.english: He alone is fulfilled in this world, who meditates on the spiritual wisdom of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਿ ਵੈਰੀ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਮ ਕੀਤਿਆ ਸਭ ਨਾਲਿ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: on vairee mitr sam keetiaa sabh naal subhaaee |
lines.english: He looks alike upon enemy and friend, and wishes well to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa paaeaa har siau ban aaee |16|
lines.english: He obtains what is pre-ordained for him, according to the Lord. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਕਾਢੀਐ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach suhaavaa kaadteeai koorrai koorree soe |
lines.english: The true person is said to be beautiful; false is the reputation of the false.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਪਲੈ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak virale jaaneeeh jin sach palai hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, rare are those who have Truth in their laps. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਮੁਖੁ ਅਨੂਪੁ ਅਠੇ ਪਹਰ ਨਿਹਾਲਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: sajan mukh anoop atthe pehar nihaalasaa |
lines.english: The face of my friend, the Lord, is incomparably beautiful; I would watch Him, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਸਚੁ ਪਰਖਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਾਵਣੁ ਥੋਥਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sajan sach parakh mukh alaavan thotharaa |
lines.english: O my friend, realize the True Lord. Just to talk about Him is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤੜੀ ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਡਿਠੁ ਤੈ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਹਉ ਖੰਨੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sutarree so sahu dditth tai supane hau khaneeai |2|
lines.english: In sleep, I saw my Husband Lord; I am a sacrifice to that dream. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤਿ ਆਕਾਸੁ ਪਾਤਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਚੰਦੁ ਸੂਰੁ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: dharat aakaas paataal hai chand soor binaasee |
lines.english: The earth, the Akaashic ethers of the sky, the nether regions of the underworld, the moon and the sun shall pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਨ ਮਝਾਹੂ ਲਖਿ ਤੁਧਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਸੁ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man majhaahoo lakh tudhahu door na su piree |3|
lines.english: See Him within your mind; your Beloved is not far away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਤੁੰਗ ਗਰੀਬ ਮਸਤ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਸਿਧਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: rang tung gareeb masat sabh lok sidhaasee |
lines.english: The poor and the rich, the humble and the intoxicated, all these people shall pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਦਿਸਾਹ ਸਾਹ ਉਮਰਾਵ ਖਾਨ ਢਾਹਿ ਡੇਰੇ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: baadisaah saah umaraav khaan dtaeh ddere jaasee |
lines.english: Emperors, bankers, rulers and leaders shall depart, and their homes shall be demolished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜੀ ਸੇਖ ਮਸਾਇਕਾ ਸਭੇ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaajee sekh masaaeikaa sabhe utth jaasee |
lines.english: The Qazis, Shaykhs and preachers shall all arise and depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਜਾ ਬਾਗ ਨਿਵਾਜ ਕਤੇਬ ਵਿਣੁ ਬੁਝੇ ਸਭ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: rojaa baag nivaaj kateb vin bujhe sabh jaasee |
lines.english: Fasts, calls to prayer and sacred scriptures - without understanding, all these shall vanish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਰ ਪੈਕਾਬਰ ਅਉਲੀਏ ਕੋ ਥਿਰੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: peer paikaabar aaulee ko thir na rahaasee |
lines.english: The spiritual teachers, prophets and disciples - none of these shall remain permanently.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਸਭ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh medanee sabh aavai jaasee |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings of the earth shall all continue coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਏਕੁ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਬੰਦਾ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: nihachal sach khudaae ek khudaae bandaa abinaasee |17|
lines.english: The One True Lord God is eternal and unchanging. The Lord's slave is also eternal. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਸਜਣ ਤੂ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਗੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਠੰਢਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aau sajan too mukh lag meraa tan man tthandtaa hoe |1|
lines.english: Come, and show me Your face, O my friend, so that my body and mind may be cooled and soothed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਠੀ ਹਭ ਢੰਢੋਲਿ ਹਿਕਸੁ ਬਾਝੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dditthee habh dtandtol hikas baajh na koe |
lines.english: I have seen and examined all; without the One Lord, there is none at all.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ ਹਿਕੁ ਤੂ ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਗਈਆਸ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aas niraasaa hik too hau bal bal bal geeaas |2|
lines.english: In the midst of hope, only You, O Lord, remain free of hope; I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice to You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਕੁ ਆਸਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਮੂ ਮਨਿ ਵਡੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: aasak aasaa baaharaa moo man vaddee aas |
lines.english: The lover is without hope, but within my mind, there is great hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੋੜਾ ਸੁਣੇ ਡੁਖੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਡਿਠੇ ਮਰਿਓਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: vichhorraa sune ddukh vin dditthe mariod |
lines.english: Even if I just hear of separation from You, I am in pain; without seeing You, O Lord, I die.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਬਿਰਹੀ ਨਾ ਧੀਰੋਦਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: baajh piaare aapane birahee naa dheerod |3|
lines.english: Without her Beloved, the separated lover takes no comfort. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਤੇਤੀਸਾ ਦੇਵਤੇ ਸਣੁ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੈ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: kott teteesaa devate san indrai jaasee |
lines.english: the three hundred thirty million gods, along with Indra, shall all pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟ ਤੀਰਥ ਦੇਵ ਦੇਵਾਲਿਆ ਕੇਦਾਰੁ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਕਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: tatt teerath dev devaaliaa kedaar mathuraa kaasee |
lines.english: River-banks, sacred shrines, idols, temples, and places of pilgrimage like Kaydarnaat'h, Mat'huraa and Benares,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਥੀ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਗੀਤ ਕਵਿਤ ਕਵਤੇ ਭੀ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: pothee panddit geet kavit kavate bhee jaasee |
lines.english: Prayer books, Pandits, religious scholars, songs, poems and poets shall also depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਚਾਰਿ ਖਟੁ ਦਰਸ ਸਮਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasatr bed chaar khatt daras samaasee |
lines.english: The Simritees, Shaastras, the four Vedas and the six systems of philosophy shall vanish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਨਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਦਿਗੰਬਰਾ ਜਮੈ ਸਣੁ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: mun jogee diganbaraa jamai san jaasee |
lines.english: The silent sages, the Yogis and the nudists, along with the Messengers of Death, shall pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀਆ ਸਭਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਵਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jatee satee saniaaseea sabh kaalai vaasee |
lines.english: Those who are celibate, truthful and charitiable, and the Sannyaasee hermits are all subject to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਵਿਣਸਣਾ ਸਭ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so vinasanaa sabh binas binaasee |
lines.english: Whatever is seen shall perish; all will dissolve and disappear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਸੀ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: thir paarabraham paramesaro sevak thir hosee |18|
lines.english: Only the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, is permanent. His servant becomes permanent as well. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੁਖੇ ਕੋੜਿ ਨ ਡੁਖ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰੀ ਪਿਖੰਦੋ ਸੁਭ ਦਿਸਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ddukhe korr na ddukh naanak piree pikhando subh disatt |1|
lines.english: millions of pains do not cause him pain. O Nanak, the Husband Lord blesses him with his Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈ ਨੰਗੇ ਨਹ ਨੰਗ ਭੁਖੇ ਲਖ ਨ ਭੁਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sai nange neh nang bhukhe lakh na bhukhiaa |
lines.english: Hundreds of times naked does not make the person naked; tens of thousands of hungers do not make him hungry;
